kind.description: Which gamepad event kind this filter selects (button, axis, connected, disconnected); see GamepadInputKind

mapping.description: How inputIndex is interpreted for button/axis kinds: 0 = W3C standard slot, 1 = raw W3C index

inputIndex.description: Button or axis index; meaning depends on kind and mapping

buttonPhase.description: bit flag for button phases to match (down, up); only used when kind = button
